name: smartclaw-solana
description: Agent Intelligence Layer for discovering, ranking, and explaining smart money activity on Solana. Connects agents to high-signal token flows, conviction rankings, and risk tags without acting as an execution endpoint.

capabilities.description: Get current Solana network monitoring scale, active wallets, token coverage, and latest rotation shifts.
Get high-priority ranked smart money wallets, signal strength, and recent behavior summaries on Solana.
Get smart money capital flow, participating addresses, and trend changes for a specific Solana token.
Get an agent-ready watchlist of Solana tokens/wallets with conviction explanations, risk tags, and freshness.
Get a structured explanation of conviction or behavior for a specific Solana wallet, token, or narrative.
Get highest PNL wallets from the f(x) Protocol leaderboard (Legacy).
Get fxUSD borrow APR from f(x) Protocol (Legacy).
Get premium leaderboard metrics. Requires x402 fxUSD payment.

x402_cookie.description: Pay $0.01 fxUSD per call via x402 protocol on Base network.
x402_cookie.flow: Access premium legacy endpoints; the x402 paywall handles wallet connection and payment automatically.
